scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --ignore-scripts && cd server && npm install --ignore-scripts && cd ../client && npm install --ignore-scripts
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.package: npm run install:all && npm run icons && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && cd electron && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run dist
scripts.package:dir: npm run install:all && npm run icons && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && cd electron && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run dist:dir
